speaker: speaker1
text: I'm a little rushed . Is there any quicker way to get there ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , of course . You can take a taxi .

speaker: speaker1
text: How much will that run me ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It depends on traffic and distance , but it is reasonable .

speaker: speaker2
text: Some are better than others . But , you shouldn't have a problem .

speaker: speaker2
text: For the most part , yes . If you don't feel comfortable with it , then it is best not to take one at night .
